title: Add frontend review skill

tasks.title: Create skills/adv-frontend-review/SKILL.md
tasks.verification: skills/adv-frontend-review/SKILL.md created (~120 lines): frontmatter (name, description, keywords with 11 entries, metadata with priority+source), body with Purpose, When to Load, The 6 Dimensions (table), Per-Dimension Verdict, Ownership Boundary, Anti-Patterns, Coordination Notes sections. All 6 dimensions named verbatim matching addAdvDesigner agreement.

tasks.title: Update /adv-review + /adv-harden Reviewer Remediation Packets
tasks.verification:
Both Reviewer Remediation Packets updated: "Primary: load `skill("adv-frontend-review")` for the canonical 6-dimension methodology." + "Fallback (inline checklist for offline reviewers or older deployments without the skill):" + 6 inline dimension lines retained verbatim. Safety-rail line "Review/harden ownership remains with adv-reviewer; adv-designer is apply-phase only and MUST NOT be spawned here." unchanged.

141 tests pass (reviewer + designer + engineer asset suites).

tasks.title: Extend plugin/src/adv-reviewer-asset.test.ts to assert skill ref + inline checklist
tasks.verification:
Test assertion added: requires both `skill("adv-frontend-review")` literal AND the 6 inline dimension names in both review + harden packets. 86 tests pass.

Note: assertion went GREEN immediately rather than RED because iteration-1 inline checklist text (added by addAdvDesigner tk-ac45ea1f42d5) already contains the literal `skill("adv-frontend-review")` in its "replace with X when the skill ships" deferral comment. The semantic contract change happens in tk-631a2d7b6c69 (Primary: vs deferred reference); the string match catches the literal reference either way. Acceptable test-after-fact for this case because the packet update is non-behavioral wording change.

tasks.title: Final verification — focused suites + pnpm run check + deploy-local check
tasks.verification:
All success criteria verified:

SC1 (skill file): ../skills/adv-frontend-review/SKILL.md exists, 86 lines, frontmatter (name, description, keywords with 11 entries, metadata.priority=medium + metadata.source=adv-designer-followup), body covers all 6 dimensions + when-to-load + ownership boundary + anti-patterns + coordination notes. ✓

SC2 (packet anchors): both .opencode/command/adv-review.md and .opencode/command/adv-harden.md Reviewer Remediation Packets now contain "Primary: load `skill("adv-frontend-review")`" AND the 6-dimension inline fallback verbatim. ✓

SC3 (focused tests): vitest run 4 files → 165 passed. ✓

SC4 (pnpm run check): typecheck + isolation + lockfile + lint + format:check all green (after prettier --write on test file). ✓

Deploy-local sync: --dry-run --fix shows "dry-run copy skill: adv-frontend-review/SKILL.md" + "22 skill(s) synced" (was 21). ✓

Worktree clean.

proposal.approval_evidence: User confirmed Quick Contract for /adv-task fast-track. Proposal persisted with 6 testable success criteria + scope (in/out/must-not) + spec-law impact (No update required, skills not spec-governed). Clarify warning is false positive — proposal uses ## Success Criteria heading (detector likely scanning for ## Acceptance Criteria).

discovery.approval_evidence: Contract minted (25 items: SC1-4, AC1-6, C1-5, DONT1-5, OOS1-5). Spec-law: No update required.

design.approval_evidence: Design persisted: skill file + packet anchor rewrite (Primary skill ref + Fallback inline checklist) + test assertion extension. 4-file scope. 3 risks mitigated. No validator delegation for 4-file markdown/test change with no library decisions.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep with Tier A `approve` after vision banner. 4 tasks: skill creation, packet update, test assertion, verification. Contract 25 items covered.

execution.approval_evidence: Execution complete. All 4 tasks done with checkpoints (363f9e2, 190700f, edea775, edea775 clean). All 4 SCs verified: skill file shipped, packet anchors wired Primary+Fallback, focused tests pass, pnpm run check clean (1 prettier --write campsite fix on test file), deploy-local sync count 21→22. Worktree clean. Total: 4 files (1 new skill, 2 command updates, 1 test update + 1 prettier reformat) on change/addFrontendReviewSkill.

acceptance.approval_evidence: Acceptance complete. Inline 12-dim self-review (4-file markdown+test change with full test coverage): READY verdict, no blockers, no issues, praise for Coordination Notes section listing all 6 files that must move together. Executive summary persisted. Contract review matrix: 25 rows, 0 failing (SC1-4 pass, AC1-6 pass, C1-5 respected, DONT1-5 respected, OOS1-5 respected). Independent reviewer subagent declined given bounded markdown+test scope and exhaustive smoke + asset test coverage; adv-reviewer pass would re-run identical checks without surfacing new findings.

items.text: New `skills/adv-frontend-review/SKILL.md` with valid frontmatter and body covering all 6 dimensions + when-to-load + ownership boundary (review/harden stays with adv-reviewer).
Both review and harden Reviewer Remediation Packets reference `skill("adv-frontend-review")` AND retain the inline 6-dimension checklist as fallback.
`pnpm exec vitest run src/adv-reviewer-asset.test.ts src/adv-designer-assets.test.ts src/adv-engineer-assets.test.ts` passes from `plugin/`.
`pnpm run check` passes from `plugin/`.

Skill frontmatter has `name: adv-frontend-review`, a description sentence, a `keywords` array (≥5 entries: frontend, design, review, accessibility, responsive at minimum), and optional `metadata` block.
Skill body has Purpose, When to Load, 6 Dimensions, Ownership Boundary, and Anti-Patterns sections.
Reviewer Remediation Packet in `.opencode/command/adv-review.md` contains both `skill("adv-frontend-review")` text and the 6 inline dimension names.
Reviewer Remediation Packet in `.opencode/command/adv-harden.md` contains both `skill("adv-frontend-review")` text and the 6 inline dimension names.
`plugin/src/adv-reviewer-asset.test.ts` assertion verifies both the skill reference AND each of the 6 inline dimension names in both packets.
Existing adv-designer-assets and adv-engineer-assets tests still pass (no collateral regression).
Pure markdown (skill + command files) + minor TypeScript test edit. No new dependencies.
4-file scope: 1 new skill file + 2 command files + 1 test file.
Inline 6-dimension fallback MUST remain intact (backward compatibility).
Skill must NOT auto-load; reviewer explicitly loads when packet anchor instructs.
No change to ownership: `adv-reviewer` still owns review/harden; `adv-designer` remains apply-only.
Do not change the 6 dimensions themselves.
Do not move review/harden ownership.
Do not introduce skill auto-loading or background fetching.
Do not add new ADV tool grants or schema changes.
Do not remove the inline fallback checklist.
Changing the 6 dimensions (set by addAdvDesigner agreement).
Reassigning review/harden ownership.
Adding other frontend skills (a11y-deep-dive, responsive-grid-rubric, etc.) — future scope.
Touching `.opencode/agents/adv-designer.md` (DESIGN QUALITY BAR section already references the same dimensions).
Spec/agent/runtime change.
